Table	Create Table
investigaciones	CREATE TABLE `investigaciones` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `titulo` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `slug` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,

  `modelo` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `escenarios` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `brechas` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `conclusion` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `metadataJson` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `escenariosConfig` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `indicesCalculados` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `imagenesSatelitales` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,

  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `publishedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `numero` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `dominioId` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `categoria` enum('hidrologia','medio_ambiente','infraestructura','salud','educacion','transporte') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,

  `fechaCierreSemantico` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `supuestosEstructurados` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `indiceRobustez` decimal(3,2) DEFAULT '0.00',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `investigaciones_slug_unique` (`slug`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=120001
